profile.name: Balanced
profile.description: Mix of growth and defense. Moderate equity exposure with meaningful bond ballast. A reasonable default for medium-term goals.

rebalance_events.rationale_text: Q1 2024 rebalance — Balanced profile. Target allocation: 45% US stocks, 30% long-term Treasuries (TLT), 15% S&P 500 (SPY), 5% gold (GLD), 5% international stocks (EFA). Equity sleeve held at equal weight across selected names. No AI tilt applied this period.
